situational_context: Running comeback day 58 (13 structured runs since May 3, 2026). Run #12 on June 21 (7.5 km, suffer 36) was an outlier spike followed by a correction period — only Run #13 (3.5 km) and ebike commutes in the 9 days since. ACWR dropped from 1.35 (June 14) to 0.72 — now in detraining territory after overcorrecting from overreaching. HRV recovering: today's overnight 38 ms is best reading in 2+ weeks, body battery 67 (highest in 2+ weeks), training readiness 83. VO2max running improved to 41.1 (from 38.3 at comeback start May 3). Weight 103.67 kg with improving body composition (muscle 72.62 kg, +1.16 kg since June 7; fat ratio 26.3%, −0.5pp). Chronic load 19.9 (up from 17.5 on June 14, +13.7%). No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest now due. Persistent protein deficit (107g/day avg vs 150g target) — potential tissue-repair bottleneck during comeback. E-bike commuting remains primary modality (~38 km round-trip on sur-site days).

recommendations.text: ACWR at 0.72 (detraining zone) — maintain the 3 planned sessions this week (Run #14, Gravel, Run #15) to rebuild acute load toward ACWR 0.8. Do not add extra volume; the ebike commute on Thursday provides additional aerobic stimulus. Recovery signals are strong today (HRV 38, BB 67, readiness 83) so the body is ready to absorb load.
recommendations.measurable: ACWR ≥ 0.75 by end of week; 3/3 planned sessions executed

recommendations.text: Protein intake averaging 107g/day (71% of 150g target) during a running comeback at 103.67 kg. Tissue repair and muscle preservation require 1.4-1.6 g/kg/day (145-166g). Add a post-workout protein source (30g whey shake or 200g Greek yogurt) and prioritise protein at each meal.

Vitamin D retest is now due (last measured Dec 2025: 27 ng/mL, insufficient). 8+ weeks of supplementation should show improvement. Schedule blood panel this week to confirm levels approaching 40 ng/mL target before increasing running volume.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR remains below 0.80 for 7+ more consecutive days after this week's planned sessions
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently at 0.72 (detraining). Need structured rebuild to return to 0.8-1.3 sweet spot.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV weekly avg drops below 32 ms (1.3σ below 90d baseline of 36.1 ms)
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 35 — holding near baseline after 2-week UNBALANCED streak. Today's overnight 38 is encouraging.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after Run #14 (July 1) triggers skip of Run #15 and gravel substitution
markers_to_watch.reason: Comeback protocol: tissue tolerance remains the bottleneck at 103.67 kg body weight.
Currently 107g/day — insufficient for tissue repair during running comeback at this body weight.
